title: Define v4.0 visibility architecture, visual grammar, and plugin boundary for operator surfaces
description: Turn the new v3.9 progress and proof surfaces into a clearer operator product by defining the visual grammar, layout responsibilities, and plugin boundary for future visibility work.
triage_notes: Next frontier after v3.9.0. The runtime now has truthful progress and proof surfaces; the next gap is a governed visual grammar, layout contract, and plugin boundary so the operator experience stays legible as visibility grows.
